name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Specified Binary Execution via Devtoolslauncher or OpenWith
notes:
This Building Block detects when OpenWith.exe or Devtoolslauncher.exe executes other binary.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community (rule), @harr0ey (idea)
SIGMA Title: OpenWith.exe Executes Specified Binary
SIGMA Description: The OpenWith.exe executes other binary

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community (rule), @harr0ey (idea)
SIGMA Title: Devtoolslauncher.exe Executes Specified Binary
SIGMA Description: The Devtoolslauncher.exe executes other binary


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Specified Binary Execution via Devtoolslauncher or OpenWith on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [devtoolslauncher.exe or OpenWith.exe]
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/c%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%launchfordeploy%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Specified Binary Execution via Devtoolslauncher or OpenWith on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [devtoolslauncher.exe or OpenWith.exe]
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/c%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%launchfordeploy%' AQL filter query
